pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 74 saves document to this exact path using python-odf library
Code analysis: export_result.sh line 8 defines OUTPUT_PATH as this exact path; task description step 7 requires saving to this location

Code analysis: Task description step 3 specifies setting Title to this value; setup_task.sh line 44 includes this text in static header; verifier.py line 75 checks for this exact value in meta.xml dc:title element
Code analysis: Task description step 4 specifies adding custom property DocNumber with value SOP-805-V2; verifier.py lines 90-93 check for this property in meta.xml user-defined elements
Code analysis: Task description step 4 specifies adding custom property Revision with value 2.0; verifier.py lines 90-93 check for this property in meta.xml user-defined elements

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic SOP document generated via python-odf library at /home/ga/Documents/SOP_805_Sterilization.odt. The document initially contains static header text 'Title: Steam Sterilization Protocol | Doc #: SOP-805 | Rev: 1.0'. The task requires setting the document title to 'Steam Sterilization Protocol' and adding two custom properties: DocNumber='SOP-805-V2' and Revision='2.0'. The modified document should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SOP_805_Automated.odt with dynamic fields instead of static text in the header. All metadata claims are correct target values for task completion.
